name: Dorothy's Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onions to the skillet and sauté until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the ground beef to the skillet and season with salt and pepper.
4. Cook the ground beef until browned and fully cooked through, breaking it up as needed, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Stir in the macaroni into the meat mixture until combined.
6. Pour in the tomato soup and water, stirring to combine everything thoroughly.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the skillet and cook on low heat for 15 minutes.
8. Serve with lettuce salad and cornbread.
End of Recipe
